canonical_definition: A multi-layer perceptron-based probe with a hidden layer and ReLU activation, used to decode digit predictions from model activations with higher expressivity than linear methods.
papers: RethinkMCTS: Refining Erroneous Thoughts inMonteCarlo Tree Search for Code Generation
Text Takes Over: A Study of Modality Bias in Multimodal Intent Detection
